spec.name: The Dark Passage
spec.description: You find yourself in a small passage ending. It is quite dark in here. As you look about the damp walls, you notice that the passageway almost appears to curve upwards towards the ceiling. Looking up, you notice that there is a small hole, just large enough to pass through. Looking closely at the curved part of the wall, it appears that someone (or something) has carved small handholds into the wall to ease passage upwards. The tunnel itself leads off to the east.
